summary: Consensus avg PT ~$266-275 across sources: MarketBeat $275.25, Public.com $267.55, Yahoo Finance $260, TipRanks avg $274.38. Bull target $380, bear $155. 42 analysts Strong Buy consensus. Current price ~$216, implying ~22-30% upside to consensus.
